Video.summary: Sam tackles the suspension in the '79 Pontiac Firebird Trans Am.
Video.title: The Bandit Project

Video.summary: Sam continues the '98 GMC Holley OBS project by completing the powertrain installation.
Video.title: Holley OBS Project

Video.summary: Sam installs the engine and transmission into the Summit Racing Bandit Project.
Video.title: Bandit Powertrain

Video.summary: Sam adds some Lokar Performance flair to the '66 Mustang.
Video.title: Lokar Hooks Up the '66

Video.summary: Sam Mahdavi shares the expertise he's gained from years in the shop.
Video.title: Season Finale With the Bandit

Video.summary: Sam gets back to his roots with an old-school Honda Civic engine swap.
Video.title: Civic Swap

Video.summary: Sam installs a Holley Sniper EFI fuel system in the OBS Chevy project.
Video.title: Sniper EFI for the OBS

Video.summary: Through fine art photography rooted in precision and restraint, Thornton reveals the true shape of automotive design. Known for his background in high stakes commercial photography, his work strips away distraction and focuses on light, proportion, and intent.
Video.title: The Observer - Alan Thortnon

Video.summary: Vicari auctioneers peddle car and truck models that span several decades and generations.
Video.title: Classic Cars and Trucks Over Time
